heading: Federal credit union organization
label: 1753 Federal credit union organization
notes: Amendments1982—, substituted “each subscribe either individually or collectively” for “subscribe”.Pub. L. 97–320, § 503Par. (4). , substituted “the initial par value of the shares” for “the par value of the shares, which shall be $5 each”.Pub. L. 97–320, § 5041978— substituted “Board” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 95–6301970— substituted “Administrator” for “Director”.Pub. L. 91–2061959— changed “The” to “the” in subsecs. (1) to (7) and the period to a semicolon in subsecs. (1) to (6) and inserted “and” at end of subsec. (6).Pub. L. 86–354

Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective on expiration of 120 days after , and transitional provisions, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–630section 509 of Pub. L. 95–630section 1752 of this titleNov. 10, 1978

Transfer of FunctionsTransfer of functions of Farm Credit Administration and Governor thereof, generally, see notes set out under .section 1751 of this titleFunctions of Governor of Farm Credit Administration under this section transferred to Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation by Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1947.

children.text: the location of the proposed Federal credit union and the territory in which it will operate;
the names and addresses of the subscribers to the certificate and the number of shares subscribed by each;
the initial par value of the shares;
the proposed field of membership, specified in detail;
the term of the existence of the corporation, which may be perpetual; and
the fact that the certificate is made to enable such persons to avail themselves of the advantages of this chapter.
